_comment: S&P Global / CIPS UK Services PMI Business Activity Index, FINAL print. One observation per monthly final press release.

methodology.indicator: Services PMI Business Activity Index — FINAL (50 = no change)
methodology.release_cadence: monthly final, first business week of the following month
methodology.extraction_notes: Values cross-checked across (a) S&P Global press-release PDFs (text-extracted via pdftotext from spglobal.com when discoverable), (b) InvestingLive/Forexlive same-day final-vs-prelim writeups (each writeup quotes the official S&P figure in title and body), and (c) Trading Economics historical narrative. Each value was further sanity-checked against the prior-month figure cited in the next month's S&P press release: e.g. December 2024 final release explicitly states 'up from 50.8 in November' (confirming Nov 2024=50.8 even though the Dec 2024 flash sheet templated 'Nov: 50.4' — the Jan-6 final release supersedes); April 2025 release states 'down from 52.5 in March' (confirming Mar 2025=52.5); January 2026 release states 'up from 51.4 in December' (confirming Dec 2025=51.4); March 2026 release states 'down from 53.9 in February' and notes 'the lowest since April 2025' (consistent with April 2025=49.0 being the prior trough). All values use the FINAL print, not flash. Anchors verified by previous research: Feb 2026=53.9, Mar 2026=50.5. Where the canonical S&P URL for an older final release was not surfaced by search, we cite either the next-month S&P final release that quotes the prior figure, or the InvestingLive title that quotes the official figure verbatim (note: the Nov-2024 Forexlive URL has a typo'd 'september' slug but its content covers November and quotes 50.8; we instead cite the Dec-2024 S&P final release which authoritatively confirms 50.8 for November).
